welcome:
🌟 Welcome to TurkTextileHub!
Your smart platform for Turkish textile trade
role_selection: 👇 Choose your role to get started:
supplier_registration_start:
🏭 Great! Let's register you as a supplier on TurkTextileHub.
Please answer the following questions:
prompt_company_name: 📋 What is your company or store name?
prompt_contact_name: 👤 What is the name of the contact person?
ask_city: 📍 In which city is your store located?
prompt_phone:
📞 What is your phone number with country code?
Example: +90 5XX XXX XXXX
ask_sales_rep: 👥 Do you have a dedicated sales representative to receive orders?
registration_success:
✅ You have been successfully registered as a supplier!
Our team will contact you soon to activate your account.
already_registered:
⚠️ You are already registered on the platform!
If you face any issues, contact our support team.
error_general: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
cancel:
🚫 Operation cancelled.
Type /start to begin again.
ask_trader_phone:
📞 What is your phone number with country code?
Example: +966 5XX XXX XXXX
ask_business_type: 💼 What type of business do you run?
trader_success:
✅ You have been successfully registered as a trader!
You'll be able to browse products and request quotes soon.
add_product_start: 📸 To add a new product, send me its photos (1 to 5 photos at once).
add_product_get_category: ✨ Great! Now choose the product category:
add_product_get_price:
💰 Enter the approximate price (optional).
You can write something like '10-12 USD' or 'Price varies by quantity'.
add_product_confirm: ✅ {count} image(s) uploaded. What would you like to do?
add_product_success: 🎉 Product published successfully! Your product is now visible on TopKap and TopGate.
add_product_no_images: ❌ No images received. Please send at least one photo.
not_registered_supplier:
⚠️ You must be a registered supplier to add products.
Use /start to register first.
browse_start: 🔍 Choose a product category to browse:
no_products_found: 😔 No products available in this category at the moment.
quote_request_sent: ✅ Your quote request has been sent to the supplier. They'll contact you soon.
my_channels_empty:
No channels connected yet.

Tap "Connect Telegram Channel" to link your first channel 🔗
dashboard_prompt: What would you like to do?
error_generic: ❌ An error occurred. Please try again later.
welcome_new_user:
Welcome to TurkTextileHub! 🇹🇷

Turkish B2B Textile Platform.
_comment: Step 6 additions — Add these keys to the existing en.json file
channel_post_expires: ⏰ This request will expire in 24 hours
channel_post_approved: ✅ Product successfully published to the catalog!
channel_post_rate_limit: ⚠️ You've exceeded the daily limit (10 posts). The limit resets tomorrow.
channel_post_edit_what: What would you like to edit?
channel_post_send_title_ar: Send the new Arabic product name:
channel_post_send_title_en: Send the new English product name:
ai_extraction_failed: ⚠️ Could not extract product data automatically. You can edit it manually.
rfq_ask_quantity: What quantity do you need? (e.g. 50 pieces)
rfq_ask_size: What size do you need? (e.g. L, XL, or multiple)
rfq_confirm_prompt: Do you want to send this request?
rfq_success_note: The supplier will contact you soon.
trader_not_registered: ⚠️ Your account is not registered as a trader.
reapply_request_sent: ✅ Reapplication Sent Our team will review your request and contact you soon.
contact_admin_sent: ✅ Message Sent to Admin Our support team will contact you soon.
welcome_message: 🇹🇷 Welcome to TopKap! Turkey's Wholesale Textile Hub. Add your products, reach buyers from 180+ countries. 🌍 Please select your language:
main_menu_supplier: 🛍️ Supplier Dashboard Select an action from the menu below: ➕ Add Product — Add a new product and publish it 📦 My Products — Manage your existing products 📊 Statistics — Sales and view reports 🔗 Channel Management — Connect your Telegram channel ⚙️ Settings — Language and account settings 💡 Why TopKap? — Discover platform advantages ❓ Help — Step-by-step usage guide
main_menu_trader: 🛒 Buyer Dashboard What would you like to do?
connect_success: ✅ Account connected successfully! You can now add products and manage your channel.
connect_error:
❌ Account connection failed.

Please try again from the TopKap app.
add_product_select_category: 📂 Select Product Category Choose the main category for your product:
add_product_select_subcategory: 📁 Select Subcategory Choose the subcategory for your product:
add_product_fill_form: 📝 Enter Product Details Send a message containing: • Product name • Price (in Turkish Lira ₺) • Minimum order quantity • Description (color, size, fabric, etc.) Example: Cotton men's shirt, white and blue, sizes S-XXL, unit price 85₺, minimum 12 pcs
add_product_upload_images: 📸 Product Images Send product images (up to 10 photos). Publishing options will appear after the first image.
channel_add_admin:
📢 Add the bot as admin to your channel:

1. Go to your channel
2. Channel Info → Administrators
3. Add @TopKapTR_bot
4. Grant post permission
error_fetching_categories: ❌ Error loading categories. Please try again.
why_topkap: 💡 Why TopKap? ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🌍 Global Buyer Network Connect with buyers from the Middle East, Europe, Africa, Central Asia and 180+ countries worldwide. Not just Arab buyers — the entire world! 📦 Easy Product Management Add your products in minutes and publish them to thousands of global buyers. 📢 Automatic Telegram Channel Publishing Your products are automatically shared to your channel in a professional format. 🌐 Multilingual Platform Turkish, Arabic, English — reach global buyers in their own language. 📊 Real-Time Analytics Track product views, clicks and sales data in real time. 🔗 TopKap & TopGate Ecosystem One account on two powerful platforms — maximum visibility, minimum effort. 💎 Premium Supplier Support 24/7 support team always by your side. ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 🏆 Turkey's #1 Textile B2B Platform
onboarding_stats: 📈 TopKap by the Numbers 🌍 180+ countries with buyer access 🏭 1,000+ Turkish textile suppliers 📦 50,000+ product catalog 📢 500+ active Telegram channels 💰 Turkish textile exports: $22 Billion/year ⚡ Be part of this growth!
topgate_share_message: 🌐 Follow me on TopGate! Discover the finest Turkish wholesale textile products. Thousands of products, competitive prices, worldwide shipping. 📲 Download TopGate and follow my profile: {supplier_url} 🏭 TopKap × TopGate — Turkey's Wholesale Textile Hub
add_product_categories_error: ❌ Failed to load categories. Please try again in a few minutes or contact support.
add_product_upload_more:
📸 Send more images.
When done, press 'Publish Now'.
add_product_publishing: 🚀 Publishing product... • Uploading images... • Saving to TopKap... • Sending to channel... This may take a few seconds.
add_product_channel_published: 📢 Also posted to your channel! Your followers can now see your product.
add_product_no_channel: ⚠️ No channel connected. To publish to your Telegram channel, connect it from 'Channel Management'.
add_product_api_error: ❌ Failed to save product. A server error occurred. Please try again.
